description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Use the quote form to request a local 2-bedroom apartment move in mid-June and choose the arrival window with the lowest hourly rate that is at most $150/hour before submitting your contact details.

target_names: Early bird slot with discounted hourly rate for 2-bedroom local moves.

tasks.name: Use the quote form to request a local 2-bedroom apartment move in mid-June and choose the arrival window with the lowest hourly rate that is at most $150/hour before submitting your contact details.
tasks.description: Use the quote form to request a local 2-bedroom apartment move in mid-June and choose the arrival window with the lowest hourly rate that is at most $150/hour before submitting your contact details.

tasks.instruction: Start a local full-service move booking for a 2-bedroom home with packing included but no storage add-on, choose a 3-mover option whose 4-hour estimate is under $900 for a date around the third week of June, and complete the booking.

target_names: Full-service 3-mover local move with packing, mid-June morning slot

tasks.name: Start a local full-service move booking for a 2-bedroom home with packing included but no storage add-on, choose a 3-mover option whose 4-hour estimate is under $900 for a date around the third week of June, and complete the booking.
tasks.description: Start a local full-service move booking for a 2-bedroom home with packing included but no storage add-on, choose a 3-mover option whose 4-hour estimate is under $900 for a date around the third week of June, and complete the booking.

tasks.instruction: On the pricing page, filter for local move packages with hourly rates of at most $140, at least 20 reviews, and ratings of 4.0+ stars, then sort by highest rating and add the top result to your comparison list.
tasks.name: On the pricing page, filter for local move packages with hourly rates of at most $140, at least 20 reviews, and ratings of 4.0+ stars, then sort by highest rating and add the top result to your comparison list.
tasks.description: On the pricing page, filter for local move packages with hourly rates of at most $140, at least 20 reviews, and ratings of 4.0+ stars, then sort by highest rating and add the top result to your comparison list.

tasks.instruction: Book a local studio apartment move for an early-June date and choose the earliest available arrival window that starts between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM, then finalize the basic booking details.

target_names: Standard studio move booked with 9am–12pm arrival window

tasks.name: Book a local studio apartment move for an early-June date and choose the earliest available arrival window that starts between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM, then finalize the basic booking details.
tasks.description: Book a local studio apartment move for an early-June date and choose the earliest available arrival window that starts between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM, then finalize the basic booking details.

tasks.instruction: Use the moving cost estimator for a 1-bedroom move, first calculate an estimate that includes 30 moving boxes, then recalculate after reducing the box count to 10 so the total comes in at or under a $500 budget, and start a booking from the adjusted estimate.

target_names: Draft booking started from estimator under $500

tasks.name: Use the moving cost estimator for a 1-bedroom move, first calculate an estimate that includes 30 moving boxes, then recalculate after reducing the box count to 10 so the total comes in at or under a $500 budget, and start a booking from the adjusted estimate.
tasks.description: Use the moving cost estimator for a 1-bedroom move, first calculate an estimate that includes 30 moving boxes, then recalculate after reducing the box count to 10 so the total comes in at or under a $500 budget, and start a booking from the adjusted estimate.

tasks.instruction: Reserve a 2-hour local labor-only job with a 2-mover crew, filtering for options without a truck and an hourly rate of at most $120, and complete the reservation form.

target_names: Labor-only reservation 2 movers for 2 hours, next week

tasks.name: Reserve a 2-hour local labor-only job with a 2-mover crew, filtering for options without a truck and an hourly rate of at most $120, and complete the reservation form.
tasks.description: Reserve a 2-hour local labor-only job with a 2-mover crew, filtering for options without a truck and an hourly rate of at most $120, and complete the reservation form.

tasks.instruction: From the promotions page, apply an active local-move offer that takes $50 off bookings over $400 to a 1-bedroom local move whose pre-discount estimate is between $600 and $650 so that the final total after discount is under $600, then complete the booking.

target_names: Morning 1BR local slot with estimate in $600–$650 range

tasks.name: From the promotions page, apply an active local-move offer that takes $50 off bookings over $400 to a 1-bedroom local move whose pre-discount estimate is between $600 and $650 so that the final total after discount is under $600, then complete the booking.

tasks.instruction: From the protection plans page, choose a full replacement-value coverage option for about $15,000 of belongings, then start a local 3-bedroom house move for an early-July date making sure that plan is selected and the total estimated cost stays under $1,800 before continuing the booking.

target_names: 3-bedroom house move with full-value protection and total under $1,800
